creator: judah.levine@colorado.edu
text:
Refer to section 30.2.2. Gateway enable does not work.

Router A in figure set to gateway_enable="yes"
Net.inet.ip.forwarding= 1

Router B in figure has default route to router a as in figure.

Packets from router b to Internet address reach router a but are not forwarded to the internet.

Packets from router b addressed to router a or from router a to router b work ok.

Router a is standard 10.3 system.
